name: start_date
description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

name: end_date
description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

name: simulation_type
description: The type of daily simulation to run. Will determine daily simulation function in SimulationEngine.

name: nutrient_standard
description: The nutrient standard to use for feed.

name: FIPS_county_code
description: Unique 5-digit code that represents a specific U.S. county.

name: include_detailed_values
description: Whether or not to add detailed_values property to the json output

name: herd_information_calf_num
description: Number of Calves (head) -- The initial number of pre-weaned calves

name: herd_information_heiferI_num
description: Number of HeiferI's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are weaned but not yet bred

name: herd_information_heiferII_num
description: Number of HeiferII's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are either eligible for breeding (based on user-inputted Breeding Start Day for heifers), or in early pregnancy

name: herd_information_heiferIII_num_springers
description: Number of HeiferIII's (head) -- The initial number of close-up heifers (heifers within the user-defined close-up period, i.e. Prefresh Day)

name: herd_information_cow_num
description: Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows.

name: herd_information_replace_num
description: Replacements (head) -- Number of replacement animals available in the replacement market

name: herd_information_herd_num
description: Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on the farm

name: herd_information_breed
description: Breed (select one) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)

name: herd_information_milking_cow_fraction
description: Fraction of cows assumed to be in milk at any given time (305/365 is the default).

name: herd_information_annual_milk_yield
description: The total milk yield generated by the farm in one year (kg). If this information is not available, it can be input as null

name: herd_initialization_initial_animal_num
description: The initial number of animals for the simulation starting with to generate the herd

name: herd_initialization_simulation_days
description: The number of days to simulate for generating the herd

name: animal_config_management_decisions_breeding_start_day_h
description: Heifer Breeding Start Day (days) -- Days old when RuFaS initiates estrus detection (first cycle to occur between 1-21 days later)

name: animal_config_management_decisions_heifer_repro_method
description: Heifer Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Synchronized Estrus Detection

name: animal_config_management_decisions_cow_repro_method
description: Cow Reproduction Protocol (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI - Combination of ED and TAI

name: animal_config_management_decisions_semen_type
description: Semen type (select one) -- The semen type (sexed or conventional) that makes up a majority of the farm's breedings

name: animal_config_management_decisions_days_in_preg_when_dry
description: Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average days in pregnancy of cows at dry-off

name: animal_config_management_decisions_heifer_repro_cull_time
description: Heifer Reproduction Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for failure to become pregnant

name: animal_config_management_decisions_do_not_breed_time
description: Cow Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The length of the breeding period after parturition for cows after which reproduction protocols stop if they fail to get pregnant

name: animal_config_management_decisions_cull_milk_production
description: Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Milk production threshold at which 'do not breed' cows are culled if they fall below

name: animal_config_management_decisions_cow_times_milked_per_day
description: Number of Milkings (per day) -- The average or most common number of times cows are milked per day (1, 2, or 3 times daily)

name: animal_config_management_decisions_milk_fat_percent
description: Milk Fat Percent (percent) -- The average or most common milk fat percentage in cow milk

name: animal_config_management_decisions_milk_protein_percent
description: Milk Protein Percent (percent) -- The average or most common milk protein percentage in cow milk

name: animal_config_management_decisions_simulate_genetics
description: Whether or not to simulate genetics for animals

name: animal_config_farm_level_male_calf_rate_sexed_semen
description: Male Calf Rate, Sexed Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen

name: animal_config_farm_level_male_calf_rate_conventional_semen
description: Male Calf Rate, Conventional Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen

name: animal_config_farm_level_keep_female_calf_rate
description: Female Calf Retention Rate (percent) -- The percentage of female calves kept and raised on-farm

name: animal_config_farm_level_wean_day
description: Wean Day (days) -- The days of age at which calves are fully weaned from milk or milk replacer

name: animal_config_farm_level_wean_length
description: Wean Length (days) -- Length of the weaning process

name: animal_config_farm_level_milk_type
description: Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)

name: animal_config_farm_level_voluntary_waiting_period
description: Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- When the cow's days in milk has reached this day, monitoring for estrus and subsequent breeding, if found, will begin. Used only in the ED and ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_conception_rate_decrease
description: Conception Rate Decrease (percent) -- The percent decrease in conception rate of each breeding after the first breeding

name: animal_config_farm_level_decrease_conception_rate_in_rebreeding
description: Decrease Conception Rate in Rebreeding -- whether or not to decrease the conception rate in rebreeding (default is false)

name: animal_config_farm_level_decrease_conception_rate_by_parity
description: Decrease Conception Rate by Parity -- whether or not to decrease the conception rate by parity (default is false)

name: animal_config_farm_level_avg_gestation_len
description: Average Gestation Length (days) -- Average length of gestation

name: animal_config_farm_level_std_gestation_len
description: Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of gestation length

name: animal_config_farm_level_prefresh_day
description: Prefresh Day -- days prior to calving at which pregnant animals enter the close-up period (i.e., the length of the close-up period)

name: animal_config_farm_level_calving_interval
description: Calving Interval (days) -- Current average calving interval, used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations

name: animal_config_farm_level_heifers_estrus_detection_rate
description: Estrus Detection Rate (fraction) -- The fraction of total heifers in estrus that are detected and inseminated in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol

name: animal_config_farm_level_heifers_estrus_conception_rate
description: Estrus Conception Rate (fraction) -- The fraction of inseminated heifers that become pregnant for heifers bred on estrus detection (ED (Estrus Detection) and SynchED protocols)

name: animal_config_farm_level_heifers_conception_rate
description: Conception Rate -- The conception rate for TAI breedings in the heifer reproductive program

name: animal_config_farm_level_heifers_estrus_detection_rate
description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The fraction of in-heat heifers that would be detected and inseminated in the SynchED programs

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_estrus_detection_rate
description: The fraction of in-heat cows that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol, including during the estrus detection portion of ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_ED_conception_rate
description: The fraction of cows with estrus detected that would conceive in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol, including during the estrus detection portion of ED-TAI protocols. When TAI protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_presynch_program
description: The presynch program (1st breeding) for cow in the TAI protocol. Currently, this is only supported in TAI protocol. When other protocols such as ED or ED-TAI are used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_presynch_program_start_day
description: The presynch program start day is the day of the first hormone injection in a presynch program used in the TAI protocol. When a presynch program is followed by an OvSynch program, the start day of the OvSynch program should be on or after the last day of the presynch program. The durations of the 3 options - PreSynch, Double OvSynch, and G6G, are 25, 16, and 8 days, respectively. Because the presynch program is only supported in TAI protocol, this value will be ignored when other protocols such as ED or ED-TAI are used, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_ovsynch_program
description: The OvSynch program to be used for cows in the TAI protocol and the TAI portion of the ED-TAI protocol. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_ovsynch_program_start_day
description: When set properly in the TAI protocol, OvSynch program start day is the day of the first GnRH injection in an OvSynch program. When the OvSynch program follows a presynch program, the start day of the OvSynch program should be on or after the last day of the presynch program. Otherwise, the OvSynch program will be shifted to start on the last day of the presynch program. When ED-TAI protocol is used and no estrus detected between the end of the voluntary waiting period and this OvSynch program start day, then the OvSynch program will start on this day. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_ovsynch_program_conception_rate
description: The conception rate for the OvSynch program used in the TAI protocol and the TAI portion of the ED-TAI protocol. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to 0.

name: animal_config_farm_level_cows_resynch_program
description: Resynch program for cow before/at/after first pregnancy check day in the TAI and ED-TAI repro protocols. When the ED protocol is used, this value will be ignored, and it is recommended to set it to None. If PGFatPD is chosen, the values for estrus detection rate and conception rate to that detected estrus following PGF are determined by estrus_detection_rate and ED_conception_rate. Anytime an insemination is performed after an ovsynch program, the conception rate will be changed to the ovsynch_program_conception_rate.

name: animal_config_farm_level_target_heifer_preg_day
description: Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target age (in days) for heifers to become pregnant - for adjusting heifer body weight

name: animal_config_farm_level_mature_body_weight_avg
description: Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows

name: animal_config_farm_level_mature_body_weight_std
description: Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_check_day_1
description: Pregnancy Check Days, Check 1 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the 1st pregnancy check

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_loss_rate_1
description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_check_day_2
description: Pregnancy Check Days, Check 2 (days) --  Days since last insemination at the second pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 1st pregnancy check

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_loss_rate_2
description: Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 2 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy checks

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_check_day_3
description: Pregnancy Check Day, Check 3 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the third pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 2nd pregnancy check

name: animal_config_from_literature_preg_loss_rate_3
description: Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 3 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy checks

name: animal_config_from_literature_avg_estrus_cycle_return
description: Average Estrous Cycle Return (days) -- Average days between calving and first estrous cycle after calving

name: animal_config_from_literature_avg_estrus_cycle_heifer
description: Heifer Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for heifers

name: animal_config_from_literature_std_estrus_cycle_heifer
description: Heifer Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)

name: animal_config_from_literature_avg_estrus_cycle_cow
description: Cow Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for cows

name: animal_config_from_literature_std_estrus_cycle_cow
description: Cow Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)

name: animal_config_from_literature_avg_estrus_cycle_after_pgf
description: Average Estrous Cycle days after PGF (days) -- Average days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol

name: animal_config_from_literature_std_estrus_cycle_after_pgf
description: Estrous Cycle days after PGF Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol

name: animal_config_from_literature_cull_day_count
description: Defines breakpoints that partition the cumulative distribution function (CDF) for culling probabilities into segments. These values correspond to the 'cull_day_prob' array, allowing for more accurate definition of the CDF.The numbers in the array represent days into the lactation (days in milk).

name: animal_config_from_literature_feet_leg_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to feet-and-leg-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six  culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_feet_leg_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of feet-and-leg-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_injury_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to injury-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_injury_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of injury-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_mastitis_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to mastitis-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_mastitis_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of mastitis-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_disease_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to general disease-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_disease_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of general disease-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_udder_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to udder-related issues. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_udder_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of udder-related culling over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_unknown_cull_probability
description: Conditional probability that a culled (sold) animal is removed due to unknown reasons. This probability is used to determine the reason for culling after it has been decided that the animal will be culled during the current lactation. The sum of probabilities for the six culling reasons equals 1.

name: animal_config_from_literature_unknown_cull_cull_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of culling for unknown reasons over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: animal_config_from_literature_death_day_prob
description: Cumulative distribution function (CDF) values associated with the likelihood of death over time. The 'cull_day_count' array defines the segments of the CDF.

name: methane_mitigation_methane_mitigation_method
description: Methane Mitigation Method (select one) -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating cows. Note that default values given are not implemented unless the specific supplement is selected here

name: methane_mitigation_3-NOP_additive_amount
description: 3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive

name: methane_mitigation_monensin_additive_amount
description: Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive

name: methane_mitigation_essential_oils_additive_amount
description: Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive

name: methane_mitigation_seaweed_additive_amount
description: Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of seaweed mitigation additive

name: housing
description: Housing Type (select one) -- The type of housing management for the herd

name: pasture_concentrate
description: Pasture Concentrate Fed (kg/head/day) -- Amount of concentrate provided to lactating cows each day if animals are housed on pasture

name: methane_model_calves
description: Methane emission models to use for calves.

name: methane_model_heiferIs
description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIs.

name: methane_model_heiferIIs
description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIIs.

name: methane_model_heiferIIIs
description: Methane emission models to use for heiferIIIs.

name: methane_model_cows_dry cows
description: Methane emission models for dry cows.

name: methane_model_cows_lactating cows
description: Methane emission models for lactating cows.

name: ration_user_input
description: User Input -- A bool value indicating if the user will provide the ration or diet formulation they would like to feed to the cattle (true) or not (false).

name: ration_formulation_interval
description: Formulation Interval (days) -- The length of time in days between when the diets are reformulated

name: ration_phosphorus_requirement_buffer
description: Percentage increase in phosphorus nutrient requirement in calculation of animal requirements. The default value is highly recommended as the starting value (e.g. some testing may be required to find a reasonable buffer value). For example, if you wanted to supply 150% of the calculated requirement, you would use a value of 50.

name: ration_maximum_ration_reformulation_attempts
description: The maximum number of attempts the ration formulation logic will make before stopping. Meant only to catch edge cases that could cause infinite loops. In normal operation, this value should never be reached.

name: pen_information_properties_id
description: Pen ID -- The index of the pen

name: pen_information_properties_pen_name
description: Pen Name -- The name or identifier of a given pen

name: pen_information_properties_animal_combination
description: Animal Combination (select one) -- The valid combinations of animal types that can be in a pen. CALF = Calves; GROWING = HeiferI's and HeiferII's; CLOSE_UP = HeiferIII's and Dry Cows; LAC_COWS = Lactating Cows

name: pen_information_properties_vertical_dist_to_milking_parlor
description: Vertical Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor

name: pen_information_properties_horizontal_dist_to_milking_parlor
description: Horizontal Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The distance (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor

name: pen_information_properties_number_of_stalls
description: Number of Stalls -- The number of stalls in the pen

name: pen_information_properties_housing_type
description: Housing Type (select one) -- The type of barn the pen is in

name: pen_information_properties_pen_type
description: Pen Type -- The type of pen (freestall, tiestall, open lot, bedded pack)

name: pen_information_properties_max_stocking_density
description: Maximum Stocking Density -- The maximum ratio of the number of animals in the pen to the number of stalls in the pen

name: pen_information_properties_minutes_away_for_milking
description: Total number of minutes that animals in this pen spend away from the pen for milking each day (being milked or traveling to/from the parlor). This value is only used if the pen contains lactating cows.

name: pen_information_properties_first_parlor_processor
description: Name of the parlor cleaning manure handler assigned to this pen. Must be a parlor cleaning handler listed in the manure processors configuration input file  (default file name: example_freestall_processor_configs.json).

name: pen_information_properties_parlor_stream_name
description: The stream identifier for the parlor-generated manure.

name: pen_information_properties_properties_stream_name
description: Unique identifier for the manure stream. Must be unique, i.e., not identical to the stream_name field of any other manure stream defined for the same pen.

name: pen_information_properties_properties_bedding_name
description: Name of the bedding configuration used for this manure stream. Must match the name of a bedding configuration listed in the animal management file (default file name: refreshed_default_animal.json).

name: pen_information_properties_properties_stream_proportion
description: For animals in a single pen, the proportion of manure produced outside of manure deposited in or while moving to or from the milking parlor that is assigned to this manure stream. The proportions of all manure streams defined for one pen must sum to 1.

name: pen_information_properties_properties_first_processor
description: Name of the first processor in the manure module that this manure stream enters. Must match the name of processor listed in the manure processors input file (cannot be assigned to a parlor stream handler).

name: bedding_configs_properties_name
description: Unique identifier to reference this bedding configuration. This value should be unique and cannot match the name of any other bedding.

name: bedding_configs_properties_bedding_mass_per_day
description: The daily mass of fresh bedding added to the housing area per animal per day on a wet weight basis (kg). Bedding mass is applied based on the total number of animals in the pen, and is not based on the stream proportion of the manure stream the bedding is assigned to.

name: bedding_configs_properties_bedding_density
description: The density of the bedding on a wet weight basis (kg/m3)

name: bedding_configs_properties_bedding_dry_matter_content
description: The fraction (0.XX) of dry matter in the bedding (unitless).

name: bedding_configs_properties_bedding_carbon_fraction
description: The bedding carbon content as a fraction (0.XX) of total mass, on a wet weight basis (unitless).

name: bedding_configs_properties_bedding_phosphorus_content
description: The bedding phosphorus content as a fraction (0.XX) of total mass, on a wet weight basis (unitless).

name: bedding_configs_properties_sand_removal_efficiency
description: The fraction (0.XX) of the fresh sand added each day that is assumed to be removed by a sand separator, settling lane, etc. immediately following manure removal from the barn (unitless)

name: heiferIIs_properties_conception_rate
description: ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).

name: heiferIIIs_properties_conception_rate
description: ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).

name: cows_properties_conception_rate
description: ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).

name: replacement_properties_conception_rate
description: ED Conception Rate - The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6).

name: birth_year
description: The birth year of the animal.

name: fat_kg
description: The average fat phenotype values of the animal.

name: protein_kg
description: The mean protein phenotype values of the animal.

name: year_month
description: The birth year and month of the baby calf.

name: estimated_protein
description: The estimated protein value for the top listing semen.

name: estimated_fat
description: The estimated fat value for the top listing semen.

name: parity_milk_yield_adjustments_parity_2_305_day_milk_yield_adjustment
description: The parity 2 milk adjustment factor for the 305 day milk yield.

name: parity_milk_yield_adjustments_parity_3_305_day_milk_yield_adjustment
description: The parity 3 milk adjustment factor for the 305 day milk yield.

name: parameter_mean_values_parameter_l_mean
description: The mean value of Wood's parameter l.

name: parameter_mean_values_parameter_m_mean
description: The mean value of Wood's parameter m.

name: parameter_mean_values_parameter_n_mean
description: The mean value of Wood's parameter n.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_1_parameter_l_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_1_parameter_m_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_1_parameter_n_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_2_parameter_l_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_2_parameter_m_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_2_parameter_n_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_3_parameter_l_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for Wood's parameter l.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_3_parameter_m_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter m.

name: parameter_standard_deviations_3_parameter_n_std_dev
description: The standard deviation for of Wood's parameter n.

name: crop_schedules_properties_crop_species
description: Name of the crop being grown. Must be selected from names of configurations defined in the crop configuration input file.

name: crop_schedules_properties_harvest_days
description: Julian day(s) of year to harvest

name: crop_schedules_properties_harvest_years
description: Calendar years in which the harvesting occurs

name: crop_schedules_properties_harvest_operations
description: Operation(s) with which this crop will be harvested.

name: crop_schedules_properties_harvest_type
description: Whether the crop uses scheduled harvests or optimal harvests

name: crop_schedules_properties_planting_days
description: Julian day(s) of year to plant

name: crop_schedules_properties_planting_years
description: Calendar years in which the planting occurs

name: crop_schedules_properties_pattern_repeat
description: Number of times that this crop schedule should be repeated.

name: crop_schedules_properties_planting_skip
description: Number of years to be skipped between planting schedule repetitions.

name: crop_schedules_properties_harvesting_skip
description: Number of years to be skipped between harvest schedule repetitions.

name: crop_configurations_properties_name
description: Unique identifier for the crop configuration.

name: crop_configurations_properties_plant_category
description: Plant category of the crop configuration.

name: crop_configurations_properties_is_nitrogen_fixer
description: Whether the crop configuration is a nitrogen fixer.

name: crop_configurations_properties_optimal_temperature
description: Ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius).

name: crop_configurations_properties_potential_heat_units
description: Total heat units required for maturity (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_max_leaf_area_index
description: Maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_first_heat_fraction_point
description: Fraction of growing season for the first point on leaf development curve (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_first_leaf_fraction_point
description: Fraction of max leaf area index at first point on leaf development curve (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_second_heat_fraction_point
description: Fraction of growing season for the second point on leaf development curve (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_second_leaf_fraction_point
description: Fraction of max leaf area index at second point on leaf development curve (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_senescent_heat_fraction
description: Fraction of potential heat units for plant senescence (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_light_use_efficiency
description: Light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ).

name: crop_configurations_properties_emergence_nitrogen_fraction
description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at emergence (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_half_mature_nitrogen_fraction
description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at half-maturity (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_mature_nitrogen_fraction
description: Nitrogen fraction of biomass at maturity (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_emergence_phosphorus_fraction
description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at emergence (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_half_mature_phosphorus_fraction
description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at half-maturity (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_mature_phosphorus_fraction
description: Phosphorus fraction of biomass at maturity (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_max_root_depth
description: Maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm).

name: crop_configurations_properties_root_distribution_param_da
description: Empirical root distribution parameter d_a (mm). See Fan, Jianling, et al. "Root distribution by depth for temperate agricultural crops." Field Crops Research 189 (2016): 68-74, table 1.

name: crop_configurations_properties_root_distribution_param_c
description: Empirical root distribution parameter c (unitless). See Fan, Jianling, et al. "Root distribution by depth for temperate agricultural crops." Field Crops Research 189 (2016): 68-74, table 1.

name: crop_configurations_properties_optimal_harvest_index
description: Optimal harvest index under ideal growth conditions (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_minimum_harvest_index
description: Minimum harvest index under drought conditions (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_dry_matter_percentage
description: Percentage of fresh yield at harvest that is dry matter (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_lignin_dry_matter_percentage
description: Percentage of dry matter yield that is lignin (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_crude_protein_percent_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is dietary crude protein at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_non_protein_nitrogen_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is non-protein nitrogen at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_starch_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is starch at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_adf_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is acid detergent fiber at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_ndf_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is neutral detergent fiber at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_sugar_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is labile carbohydrate at harvest (unitless).

name: crop_configurations_properties_ash_at_harvest
description: Percentage of dry matter mass that is ash at harvest (unitless).

name: available_fertilizer_mixes_properties_N
description: Fraction of nitrogen contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

name: available_fertilizer_mixes_properties_P
description: Fraction of phosphorus contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

name: available_fertilizer_mixes_properties_K
description: Fraction of potassium contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

name: available_fertilizer_mixes_properties_ammonium_fraction
description: Fraction fertilizer nitrogen that is ammonium. All non-ammonium nitrogen is assumed to be nitrate.

name: mix_names
description: List of the mix names that will be used for the corresponding fertilizer application.

name: years
description: List of years in which fertilizer will be applied.

name: days
description: List of days on which fertilizer will be applied.

name: nitrogen_masses
description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: phosphorus_masses
description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: potassium_masses
description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: application_depths
description:
List of depths at which the fertilizer is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

name: surface_remainder_fractions
description: List of fractions of fertilizer which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

name: pattern_repeat
description: Number of times that this fertilizer application schedule should be repeated.

name: pattern_skip
description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

name: years
description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

name: days
description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

name: nitrogen_masses
description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: phosphorus_masses
description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: potassium_masses
description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

name: coverage_fractions
description: List of fractions of how much of the field is covered by the corresponding manure application.

name: application_depths
description:
List of depths at which the manure is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

name: surface_remainder_fractions
description: List of fractions of manure which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

name: manure_types
description: The type of manure which will be requested for the application.

name: supplement_manure_nutrient_deficiencies
description: Determines if nutrient deficient manure applications are supplemented with chemical fertilizer.

name: pattern_repeat
description: Number of times that this manure application schedule should be repeated.

name: pattern_skip
description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

name: years
description: List of years in which tillage will occur.

name: days
description: List of days on which tilling will occur.

name: tillage_depths
description:
List of depths that the corresponding tillage applications reach.
Units: mm.

name: incorporation_fractions
description: List of fractions of surface pools that get incorporated into the soil during applications.

name: mixing_fractions
description: List of fractions of soil layer pools that are available to mix into other soil layers.

name: implements
description: List of tillage implements which will be used to execute the tillage operations.

name: pattern_repeat
description: Number of times that this tillage schedule should be repeated.

name: pattern_skip
description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

name: natural_gas_cost_kwh
description: cost of natural gas per kwh

name: alfalfa_tillage_emissions
description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from alfalfa tillage

name: corn_grain_tillage_emissions
description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn grain tillage

name: corn_silage_tillage_emissions
description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn silage tillage

name: calf_feeds
description: Calf Feeds (raised off farm - 24 hrs of age).

name: growing_feeds
description: Growing Feeds (HeiferI and HeiferII - return at 20 months) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding. Heifer II is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy.

name: close_up_feeds
description: Close Up Feeds (HeiferIII and Dry Cows) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers and Dry Cows are non-lactating cows.

name: purchased_feeds_properties_buffer
description: Fractional number 0 to 1 as a cushion for feed purchases to help plan for herd fluctuations and feed shrink.

name: milk_reduction_maximum
description: Milk Reduction Maximum -- Allowable amount of milk reduction (kg) when dietary nutrient supply cannot meet animal requirements

name: user_defined_ration_percentages_tolerance
description: Tolerance -- Allowable +/- fraction variance for each of the defined ration inclusion percentage values. As an example: a feed with a user defined ration percentage value of 20% and tolerance of 0.1 would correspond to an allowable range of 18% to 22%.

name: max_daily_feed_recalculations_per_year
description: The maximum number of feed recalculations that can be performed per year.

name: allowances_properties_runtime_purchase_allowance
description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds on a single day. These are set by the user.

name: allowances_properties_advance_purchase_allowance
description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds at the beginning of a ration interval. These are set by the user.

name: allowances_properties_planning_cycle_allowance
description: Upper limits of purchased feed masses and/or money that can be spent on purchased feeds at the beginning of a new planning cycle. These are set by the user.

name: rufas_id
description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

name: Name
description: A general common name for the feed as defined within RuFaS.

name: feed_description
description: A more specific description of the feed that uniquely distinguishes it from other feeds with a similar or same name.

name: feed_type
description: The general type or category of the feed (group).

name: units
description: The unit of measurement used for the feed.

name: rufas_id
description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

name: feed_type
description: The general type or category of the feed.

name: DM
description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

name: CP
description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

name: NDICP
description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

name: ADICP
description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

name: Kd
description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

name: dRUP
description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

name: is_wetforage
description: Identifier of wet forage type feed.

name: rufas_id
description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

name: feed_type
description: The general type or category of the feed.

name: DM
description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

name: CP
description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

name: Kd
description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

name: dRUP
description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

name: ADICP
description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

name: NDICP
description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

name: is_wetforage
description: Identifier of wet forage type feed.

name: anaerobic_digester_properties_name
description: The unique identifier of the anaerobic digester. Cannot match the name of any other manure processor.

name: anaerobic_digester_properties_processor_type
description: The type of anaerobic digester used.

name: anaerobic_digester_properties_anaerobic_digestion_temperature_set_point
description: Temperature set point of the anaerobic digester (degrees C).

name: anaerobic_digester_properties_hydraulic_retention_time
description: Number of days on average that manure spends in the anaerobic digester (days).

name: anaerobic_digester_properties_biogas_leakage_fraction
description: Fraction of methane generated in the anaerobic digester that escapes to the atmosphere through unintended  leakage and is not collected by the gas capture system (unitless).

name: handler_properties_name
description: The unique identifier of the handler processor. Cannot match the name of any other manure processor.

name: handler_properties_cleaning_water_use_amount
description: Amount of total (recycled plus fresh) cleaning water used per animal per day (L/animal/day).

name: handler_properties_cleaning_water_recycle_fraction
description: Fraction of cleaning water that is from recycled (not fresh) water sources (unitless).

name: handler_properties_use_parlor_flush
description: This input is applicable only to parlor cleaning handlers. Indicator for if a flush system is used in the milking parlor and/or holding area. This flush water may be partially or fully recycled and is in addition to routine parlor cleaning that utilizes only fresh water.

name: separator_properties_name
description: The unique identifier of the separator.

name: separator_properties_separated_solids_dry_matter
description: The dry matter fraction (0.XX percent DM by mass) of manure solids generated from solid liquid separation.

name: separator_properties_total_solids_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing total solids from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_volatile_solids_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing volatile solids from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_nitrogen_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing nitrogen from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_ammoniacal_nitrogen_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing ammoniacal nitrogen from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_phosphorus_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing phosphorus from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_potassium_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing potassium from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: separator_properties_ash_efficiency
description: The efficiency of the separator in removing ash from the manure into the separated solids fraction.

name: storage_properties_name
description: The unique identifier of the storage processor.

name: storage_properties_capacity
description: The volumetric capacity of the storage (m^3).

name: storage_properties_cover
description: The type of cover used with the specified storage.

name: storage_properties_storage_time_period
description: The length of time (days) manure is stored for between emptying events.

name: storage_properties_surface_area
description: The surface area of the manure storage (m^2).

name: storage_properties_composting_type
description: Composting method, applicable only to the composting storage type.

name: storage_properties_is_mixed
description: Indicator for if the bedded pack is regularly mixed to promote composting activity.

name: processor_connections_properties_processor_name
description: The unique identifier of a non-separator processor.

name: processor_connections_properties_properties_receiving_processor_name
description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

name: processor_connections_properties_properties_proportion
description: The proportion of the origin processor output to be passed to the receiving processor.

name: separator_connections_properties_processor_name
description: The unique identifier of a separator processor.

name: separator_connections_properties_properties_receiving_processor_name
description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

name: separator_connections_properties_properties_proportion
description: The proportion of the origin separator liquid output to be passed to the receiving processor.

name: separator_connections_properties_properties_receiving_processor_name
description: The unique identifier of the receiving processor.

name: separator_connections_properties_properties_proportion
description: The proportion of the origin separator solid output to be passed to the receiving processor.

name: second_moisture_condition_parameter
description:
Curve number parameter for average moisture condition equation.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - CN2.

name: average_subbasin_slope
description:
Slope of the field, measured as rise over run.
Units: meters / meters or unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - HRU_SLP.

name: slope_length
description:
Length of the slope.
Units: meters.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - SLSUBBSN.

name: manning_roughness_coefficient
description:
Manning's "n" value for overland flow.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - OV_N.

name: support_practice_factor
description:
Ratio of soil loss with a specific support practice based on slope characteristics.This value adjusts for terracing, contouring, and stripcropping, and these features are not present in V1, so this value IS NOT used.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - USLE_P.

name: albedo
description:
Ratio of solar radiation reflected by soil to amount of incident upon it.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ALB

name: initial_residue
description:
Amount of residue present on the soil surface at the start of the simulation.
Units: kg / ha.

name: humus_mineralization_rate_factor
description:
Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P).
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CMN.

name: denitrification_rate_coefficient
description:
Controls the rate of denitrification.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CDN.

name: denitrification_threshold_water_content
description:
Fraction of field capacity water content above which denitrification takes place.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - SDNCO

name: residue_fresh_organic_mineralization_rate
description:
Fraction of residue that will decompose in a day given optimal conditions.
Unitless.
Reference SWAT Input: .BSN - RSDCO.

name: soil_evaporation_compensation_coefficient
description:
Modifies depth distribution used to meet soil evaporative demand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU, .BSN - ESCO

name: soil_layers_properties_bottom_depth
description:
Bottom depth of this soil layer.
Units: mm.

name: soil_layers_properties_soil_water_concentration
description:
Concentration of water in this layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_wilting_point_water_concentration
description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_field_capacity_water_concentration
description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_saturation_point_water_concentration
description:
Concentration of water in a layer when it has become saturated.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_saturated_hydraulic_conductivity
description:
Measure of ease of water movement through the soil.
Units: mm / hour.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_K.

name: soil_layers_properties_initial_temperature
description:
Temperature of the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: degrees Celsius.

name: soil_layers_properties_bulk_density
description:
Ratio of mass of solid particles to total volume of soil.
Units: Megagrams / cubic meter or grams / cubic centimeter.

name: soil_layers_properties_organic_carbon_fraction
description:
Fraction of soil weight that is organic carbon.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CBN.

name: soil_layers_properties_clay_fraction
description:
Fraction of soil weight that is clay.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CLAY.

name: soil_layers_properties_silt_fraction
description:
Fraction of soil weight that is silt.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SILT.

name: soil_layers_properties_sand_fraction
description:
Fraction of soil weight that is sand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SAND.

name: soil_layers_properties_rock_fraction
description:
Fraction of soil weight that is rock.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ROCK.

name: soil_layers_properties_initial_labile_inorganic_phosphorus_concentration
description:
Concentration of labile inorganic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_initial_fresh_organic_phosphorus_concentration
description:
Concentration of fresh organic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_initial_soil_nitrate_concentration
description:
Concentration of nitrate in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_initial_soil_ammonium_concentration
description:
Concentration of ammonium in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

name: soil_layers_properties_ammonium_volatilization_cation_exchange_factor
description:
Controls the rate of ammonium volatilization.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical Documentation eqn. 3:1.3.5.

name: simulate_phosphorus_stress

name: Tractor C (unitless)

name: Tractor F (unitless)

description: Parameter G as described in the scientific references

description: A list of feed storage instances that are used on the farm.

name: parallel_workers
description: How many parallel workers should Task Manager use

name: export_input_data_to_csv
description: Select this flag to export the input data pool into a CSV file for all tasks.

name: input_data_csv_export_path
description: The path to save the exported input data CSV file.

name: input_data_csv_import_path
description: If user wish to compare the input data with previous runs, the user can pass in the previously saved input data CSV path. The result will be combined together for a side-by-side comparison.

name: tasks_properties_task_type
description: What kind of task is this?

name: tasks_properties_metadata_file_path
description: The path to the metadata JSON files to load and use in the Input Manager of this task

name: tasks_properties_input_root
description: Root directory for all input files.

name: tasks_properties_properties_file_path
description: The path to the first metadata properties JSON file to load and compare to the other metadata file loaded

name: tasks_properties_comparison_properties_file_path
description: The path to the second metadata properties JSON file to load and compare to the other metadata file loaded

name: tasks_properties_convert_variable_table_path
description: The path to the CSV file that contains the previous and the new name of variables.

name: tasks_properties_output_prefix
description: Will be used to generate a name for each of the output files for this task.

name: tasks_properties_log_verbosity
description: Specifies the level of log type to be printed on console.

name: tasks_properties_variable_name_style
description: The formatting option for variable_names.txt file

name: tasks_properties_init_herd
description: Select this flag if you want to initialize the herd by generating a herd population through simulation.

name: tasks_properties_save_animals
description: Choose this flag if you want to save the generated herd data into a JSON file.

name: tasks_properties_save_animals_directory
description: The saving directory for animals if save_animals is set to true

name: tasks_properties_filters_directory
description: The directory for the files containing the output filters

name: tasks_properties_csv_output_directory
description: The directory for the csv output files to be saved

name: tasks_properties_json_output_directory
description: The directory for the JSON output files to be saved.

name: tasks_properties_report_directory
description: The directory for reports to be saved to.

name: tasks_properties_logs_directory
description: The directory for saving log message files, variable names, and other simulation outputs to.

name: tasks_properties_suppress_log_files
description: If true, logs will not be written as output files.

name: tasks_properties_run_eee
description: Run the emissions, energy, and economics estimators prior to post-processing.

name: tasks_properties_load_saved_output_pools
description: Load previously saved output pools prior to post-processing.

name: tasks_properties_properties_name
description: Identifier applied to variables loaded from this pool.

name: tasks_properties_properties_path
description: File path to the saved output pool JSON file.

name: tasks_properties_output_pool_path
description: The path to a JSON files to load the Output Manager's pool from for post processing

name: tasks_properties_random_seed
description: The random seed, set it to 0 to auto-generate it

name: tasks_properties_chunkification
description: Whether to periodically save the output variable pool to a file.

name: tasks_properties_save_chunk_threshold_call_count
description: The threshold add variable call count for saving the output variable pool chunk.

name: tasks_properties_maximum_memory_usage
description: The maximum memory usage in Bytes.

name: tasks_properties_maximum_memory_usage_percent
description: The maximum percentage of memory use. If save_chunk_threshold_call_count is provided, then that is what is used to determine when to chunk, otherwise it is maximum memory usage, otherwise it is max memory usage percent.

name: tasks_properties_multi_run_counts
description: If task type is multi_run, indicates how many single simulations should run.

name: tasks_properties_skip_values
description: The number of points in the sampling sequence to skip for Sensitivity Analysis

name: tasks_properties_sampler_n
description: The number of samples to generate for Sensitivity Analysis. Ideally a power of 2 and >= 'skip_values'

name: tasks_properties_properties_variable_name
description: The name of the variable to be sampled, has to match within Input Manager Pool

name: tasks_properties_properties_data_type
description: Specifies the data type of this variable

name: tasks_properties_SA_load_balancing_start
description: The lower bound value for sensitivity analysis load balancing

name: tasks_properties_SA_load_balancing_stop
description: The upper bound value for sensitivity analysis load balancing

name: tasks_properties_cross_validation_file_paths
description: List the of file path(s) to the cross validation rule JSON file(s).
